en.extract:
Bonaparte's nightjar (Caprimulgus concretus), also known as the Sunda nightjar, is a species of nightjar in the family Caprimulgidae. It is native to the islands of Sumatra, Belitung and Borneo. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.


References


External links
BirdLife Species Factsheet.

'''Bonaparte's nightjar''' ('''''Caprimulgus concretus'''''), also known as the '''Sunda nightjar''', is a species of [[nightjar]] in the family [[Caprimulgidae]]. It is native to the islands of [[Sumatra]], [[Belitung]] and [[Borneo]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].<ref name=iucn/>
